steps.t: A spare apple-bobbing tub can be found near the base of the Hill, but be sure to avoid Bobbers-to-Be while you carry it back to Camellia Boffin.
Camellia Boffin is by the apple-bobbing game near the Party Tree.
A spare apple-bobbing tub can be found within Appledores, the orchard on the Hill, but be sure to avoid Bobbers-to-Be while you carry it back to Camel…
Camellia Boffin is by the apple-bobbing game near the Party Tree.
